payload.text: https://www.behance.net/gallery/172127453/APE-BONKEY-NFT-WEB-SITE-WEB3-CRYPTO...lets make an exact design for our own site- "wavvvy"

**Analyzing Visuals for Wavvvy**

I'm deep-diving into the "APE BONKEY" Behance project. The goal is to distill its energetic Web3/NFT vibe into "wavvvy." I'm focusing on its bold typography and the overall visual impact, extracting the key aesthetic elements to inform the new design. It's all about capturing that high-impact feel.


**Defining Project Parameters**

I've established the core visual and technical parameters. I'm visualizing vibrant neons, glitch effects, and 3D characters, alongside key UI elements like the "Connect Wallet" button and roadmap. The technology stack is defined: React, TypeScript, Tailwind, and Gemini API for dynamic content. I've also outlined the project's directory structure, including components, services, and constants. Further, the background will be dark, with deep purples and blacks, and the typography will be bold sans-serif. I am focusing on an architecture that emphasizes rounded corners and glassmorphism.


**Refining Component Structure**

I am now focusing on refining the core React component structure, and I am working to define individual features. I am refining the navbar with a transparent and blurred look, along with the "Connect" button. I am implementing an animated hero background with a prominent call to action. I am also working on adding stat components for floor price and volume. Additionally, I am constructing a gallery component with filtering and grid display, and also an AI-powered lore generation tool that is to be connected with Gemini. I have also made several minor technical checks and corrections.
